content: We can frame Self-Refine’s iterative self-improvement pipeline as a single-perspective baseline to anchor multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms: we can test whether contrasting Self-Refine’s sequentially refined outputs against inconsistent alternative problem-solving perspectives from newer self-reflection frameworks produces larger gains in output quality than either approach alone. This creates a hybrid framework that retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while leveraging the error-detection power of multi-perspective reflection.
